ItacPersonItem.Notes: He obtained a degree in philosophy and one in medicine at the University of Padua. Savioli taught practical medicine in Padua for a long time. He joined the Ricovrati in 1684. In the Academy he recited an eulogy in praise of Captain Lorenzo Tiepolo. One of his sonnets is in Composizioni per la morte di Elena Cornaro Piscopia (1684).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
